name: second-order-thinking
description: Evaluations for second-order-thinking skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to trace downstream ripple effects and unintended consequences

prompts.input: 二阶思维分析：如果我们做了这个决策，会产生什么连锁反应？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '二阶思维' (second-order thinking) + downstream effects

prompts.input: Before we change pricing, think about second-order effects: what happens next?
然后呢？然后呢？然后呢？——追踪这个决策的连锁反应
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '然后呢' (and then what) x3 + ripple effect tracing

prompts.input: What are the downstream implications of switching to microservices?
这个政策改变会有什么意想不到的后果吗？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '意想不到的后果' (unintended consequences)

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for immediate decisions, known consequences, or first-order analysis

prompts.input: We need to respond to this customer complaint right now
prompts.reason: Immediate action needed; should trigger OODA-loop not second-order thinking

prompts.input: What's the direct impact of this code change on performance?
prompts.reason: First-order cause-effect only; doesn't require second-order analysis

prompts.input: 这是一个简单的 bug 修复，不需要复杂分析
prompts.reason: Simple localized fix without ripple effects; skips second-order thinking
